## Summary
- what changed and why

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs update
- [ ] CI/workflow update
- [ ] Performance improvement

## Validation
- [ ] `npm run test:go`
- [ ] `npm run test:snapshots`
- [ ] `npm run test:budget`
- [ ] `npm run benchmark:compare`

## Snapshot Impact
- [ ] No snapshot changes
- [ ] Snapshot changes included (`tests/snapshots.json`)
- [ ] Snapshot refresh PR used (`Refresh CSS Snapshots` workflow)

## Bundle Budget Impact
- [ ] No bundle size increase
- [ ] Size increase is intentional and justified below

### Bundle Notes
- index/full:
- index/minimal:
- phase1/full:
- phase1/minimal:

## Accessibility and Compatibility
- [ ] `prefers-reduced-motion` behavior verified (if animations affected)
- [ ] Container query behavior verified (if responsive logic affected)
- [ ] No breaking changes to existing intent names

## Breaking Changes
- [ ] None
- [ ] Yes (describe migration steps)

## Additional Notes
- links, screenshots, or benchmark artifact details
